post.subject: The Line
post.body:
I have a theory. 

I often get tired between 11:30 and 1:30. I feel that if I go to bed then I would be able to sleep then. But i just cant. So normally I dont go to sleep until after that, then I'm just not tired anymore. So trying to go to sleep anytime after that is a disaster. It just doesnt happen. So I dont get to sleep until about 5am... like this morning. I think i gotta try goin to sleep early. 
The thin line between tired and not tired...
